facebook.caption: POV: you're in Phu Quoc craving something that isn't seafood or bánh mì. You take a random turn on Đ. 30 Tháng 4. You find Nhà hàng Chay Minh Tâm. 4.6 stars. 261 reviews. Full vegan menu on an island famous for grilled fish. Nobody talks about this place enough. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Plates landing on the table at Nhà hàng Chay Minh Tâm. Full vegan spread. Phu Quoc island. 4.6 stars from 261 real reviews. Your non-seafood day sorted.

instagram.caption: POV: found the vegan restaurant Phu Quoc wasn't supposed to have. Nhà hàng Chay Minh Tâm. 4.6★, 261 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Vegan food hitting different on a seafood island. Nhà hàng Chay Minh Tâm, Phu Quoc. 4.6 stars. Go.

tiktok.caption: Didn't expect to find THIS in Phu Quoc. 4.6 stars, 261 reviews, full vegan menu. Nhà hàng Chay Minh Tâm #PhuQuoc #VeganTravel #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel
